channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists finally solved why some frogs survive a deadly fungus
item.description: A deadly fungus has wiped out amphibian populations around the globe, yet some mysteriously recover. Researchers discovered that survivors develop pow...

item.title: This pet gecko could help scientists unlock the secrets of cancer
item.description: An unusual leopard gecko that naturally develops aggressive tumors may become an important new model for cancer research. Scientists found its tumors ...

item.title: Are humans truly the ultimate super-predator?
item.description: Humans are often called the planet's ultimate super-predator, but wild animals do not fear all humans equally. After analyzing three decades of data...

item.title: Astronomers discover four hidden white dwarf stars near Earth
item.description: Four nearby white dwarf stars have been discovered hiding in plain sight next to brighter red dwarf companions. Hubble's ultraviolet observations finally...
